heading: Preservation of electronic messages and other records
label: 2912 Preservation of electronic messages and other records

children.text: require the electronic capture, management, and preservation of such electronic records in accordance with the records disposition requirements of chapter 33;
require that such electronic records are readily accessible for retrieval through electronic searches; and
include timelines for Federal agency implementation of the regulations that ensure compliance as expeditiously as practicable.

children.heading: .—Coverage of Other Electronic Records
children.label: b .—Coverage of Other Electronic Records
children.text: To the extent practicable, the regulations promulgated under subsection (a) shall also include requirements for the capture, management, and preservation of other electronic records.

children.heading: .—Review of Regulations Required
children.label: c .—Review of Regulations Required
children.text: The Archivist shall periodically review and, as necessary, amend the regulations promulgated under subsection (a).
